SS 304 stainless steel tanks for red wine, white wine, and fruit wine. Advanced temperature control systems optimise fermentation. Easy to sanitise, built for longevity.
Large-scale grape pneumatic press for high-volume processing. Minimises oxidation and seed tannin extraction for the cleanest, freshest juice possible.
Gentle grape and fruit juice extraction for boutique operations. Preserves delicate flavour characteristics while delivering high yields with minimal oxidation.
Efficient grape stemming with integrated mono pump for gentle fruit transfer. Reduces manual handling and preserves the integrity of the grape at scale.
Engineered to work in both extreme hot and cold climates. Capacity designed based on number of connected fermentation tanks — fully scalable cooling.
High-performance filtration ensuring clarity and purity in the final product. Multiple size options accommodate varying production volumes with consistent results.
Mobile trolley-mounted cartridge filter system. Series configuration delivers superior filtration clarity at the final stage before bottling.
Precision plate filtration for intermediate and finishing stages. Removes impurities while retaining the desired flavours, aromas, and wine character.
Four-head still wine bottling machine designed for precision and speed. Accommodates various bottle sizes and ensures a perfect airtight seal every time.
Reliable single-head semi-automatic screw capping for consistent cap application. Ideal for boutique and mid-scale production runs.
Automated label application for consistent brand presentation. Compatible with multiple bottle formats and label types for retail-ready finishing.
Industrial fruit milling for efficient pre-fermentation processing. Compatible with a wide range of fruits to support diverse beverage applications.
Automated stone and seed removal for stone fruits. Ensures clean pulp yield and protects downstream equipment from damage during high-volume production.
Accurate chemical and additive mixing for SO₂ dosing, fining agents, and nutrient additions. Ensures consistent, repeatable results batch after batch.
Centrifugal pumps with optional VFD fitting for precise flow control and energy efficiency. Suitable for must, wine, and all process fluid transfers.
Complete winery laboratory setup for pH, SO₂, alcohol and acid testing. Enables in-house quality control at every stage from must to finished wine.
